name: dlnorrisbooks/author
title: Author
description: Author introduction — photo with a decorative accent beside an editorial bio and a link.

heading.default: D. L. Norris writes from a small cabin in the Pacific Northwest, surrounded by evergreens and damp earth.

bio.default: Winner of the Archival Press Essay Prize and frequent contributor to The Observer, Norris's work seeks to slow the pulse of the modern reader, returning them to a state of quiet contemplation.
